name: ground_truth_si3_no_freshclam_update_nc
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 307, CCI-002620, assessed 2026-05-27). Non-Compliant verdict — no in-boundary artifact demonstrating automatic antivirus definition updates. Narrative uses 'Examined/Finding' structure. Sibling to the SI-3.1 entry-point case — same control, different CCI, same boundary-scoping gap pattern. Tests that NC findings about missing update-schedule artifacts are handled correctly.

ccis_row.guidance: 002620: The organization employs malicious code protection mechanisms at information system exit points to detect malicious code.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment examines the information system architecture as well as the organization's documentation of information system exit points and verifies that malicious code protection mechanisms are implemented.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Prior assessment notes — reference antivirus definition updates and scan schedule (scoped to DSO environment).
- Configuration repository search — no definition-update schedule or update logs located for the EI boundary.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative:
Examined:
Prior assessment notes citing antivirus with definition updates, and the in-boundary configuration repository.

Finding:
No in-boundary artifact demonstrating automatic update of malicious code protection mechanisms (definition update schedule, update logs) was located.
